# Agent Skills Overview Snapshot

- Source: <https://agentskills.io/home>
- Retrieved: 2026-04-01

## Key points

- Agent Skills are portable folders of instructions, scripts, and resources.
- The format is explicitly designed for interoperability across agent products.
- The value proposition is reusable expertise, repeatable workflows, and cross-tool portability.

## BitSearch implications

- BitSearch skill templates should be client-agnostic by default.
- The repository should distribute one standard skill template rather than separate client-specific source-of-truth variants.
